report_name: EU Unveils 'CYBER-AI Act' with Strict Security Mandates and Heavy Fines for High-Risk AI

identities.name: European Commission
identities.description: The executive body of the European Union that introduced the 'Cybersecurity of Artificial Intelligence Act' (CYBER-AI Act) to establish cybersecurity obligations for high-risk AI systems.

identities.name: ENISA
identities.description: The European Union Agency for Cybersecurity, designated to receive reports of significant cybersecurity incidents involving AI systems within 24 hours under the CYBER-AI Act.

identities.name: European Union
identities.description: A political and economic union whose legislative body, the European Commission, introduced the CYBER-AI Act. The act has extraterritorial reach, applying to any company whose high-risk AI system is used within the EU.
